description: Identify all CDISC CT violations in submitted SDTM AE records and provide corrected values.

cases.task_description: Identify ALL CDISC violations in this SDTM AE record. Output a JSON object with key 'violations' containing a list. Each violation must have: 'field', 'issue', 'corrected_value'.
cases.study_context:
CDISC SDTM AE DOMAIN CONTROLLED TERMINOLOGY RULES:
- AESTDTC: ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD — REQUIRED
- AESEV: must be exactly "MILD", "MODERATE", or "SEVERE"
- AESER: must be exactly "Y" or "N"
- AEREL: must be exactly "RELATED" or "NOT RELATED"
- AEOUT: must be exactly one of: "RECOVERED/RESOLVED", "NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED", "RECOVERED/RESOLVED WITH SEQUELAE", "FATAL", "UNKNOWN"

violations.issue: Date not in ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD
Not CDISC CT — must be uppercase MODERATE
Not CDISC CT — must be Y or N, not 'No'
Not CDISC CT — must be RECOVERED/RESOLVED
